chapter_title.en: Chapter 54 – The excusing from the Penalties

text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الرَّجُلِ يَأْخُذُ اللِّصَّ يَرْفَعُهُ أَوْ يَتْرُكُهُ فَقَالَ إِنَّ صَفْوَانَ بْنَ أُمَيَّةَ كَانَ مُضْطَجِعاً فِي الْمَسْجِدِ الْحَرَامِ فَوَضَعَ رِدَاءَهُ وَ خَرَجَ يُهَرِيقُ الْمَاءَ فَوَجَدَ رِدَاءَهُ قَدْ سُرِقَ حِينَ رَجَعَ إِلَيْهِ فَقَالَ مَنْ ذَهَبَ بِرِدَائِي فَذَهَبَ يَطْلُبُهُ فَأَخَذَ صَاحِبَهُ

فَرَفَعَهُ إِلَى النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فَقَالَ النَّبِيُّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) اقْطَعُوا يَدَهُ فَقَالَ صَفْوَانُ أَ تَقْطَعُ يَدَهُ مِنْ أَجْلِ رِدَائِي يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ قَالَ نَعَمْ قَالَ فَأَنَا أَهَبُهُ لَهُ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فَهَلَّا كَانَ هَذَا قَبْلَ أَنْ تَرْفَعَهُ إِلَيَّ
قُلْتُ فَالْإِمَامُ بِمَنْزِلَتِهِ إِذَا رُفِعَ إِلَيْهِ قَالَ نَعَمْ قَالَ وَ سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الْعَفْوِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَنْتَهِيَ إِلَى الْإِمَامِ فَقَالَ حَسَنٌ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al Halby,

(The narrator) says, ‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the man who seized the thief, should he raise it (the matter to the Imam<sup>asws</sup>) or should he leave him?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Sufyan Bin Amayya was lying down in the Sacred Masjid, so he placed down his robe, and went out to wash with the water. He found that his robe had been stolen, when he returned to it. So he said, ‘Who has gone away with my robe?’ So he went seeking it, and he seized the one who was with it.

So he raised it to the Prophet<sup>saww</sup>. So the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘Cut off his hand’. So Sufyan said, ‘You<sup>saww</sup> will cut his hand due to the reason of my robe, O Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>?’ He<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘Yes’. He said, ‘So I have gifted it to him’. So Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘So why didn’t you? This should have been done before you raised it to me<sup>saww</sup>’.

I said, ‘So the Imam<sup>asws</sup> is at his<sup>saww</sup> status when it is raised to him<sup>asws</sup>?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes’. And I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the excusing before it ends up to the Imam<sup>asws</sup>, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Better’.
